attempts.strategy: erw/defeq recipe: tmul via erw [stalkTensorDescU_tmul, germ_smul] + term-mode smul_tmul'.symm; add via refine (map_add _).trans + congrArg; zero via simp only + exact map_zero _

attempts.insight: CARRIER-DUALITY RECIPE: never rw [smul_tmul'] or map_add/map_zero directly on ConcreteCategory.hom g; instead (1) erw for stalkTensorDescU_tmul (defeq through reducible), (2) erw [smul_add]/[germ_smul] to pull raw-TensorProduct smul via defeq, (3) term-mode map_add/map_zero (refine ...trans / exact map_zero _) for the additive maps. r•0 is defeq 0 so exact map_zero _ fires.
